required.name: from_date
required.description: Inclusive lower bound applied to DATE(recipes.start_time).

required.name: to_date
required.description: Inclusive upper bound applied to DATE(recipes.start_time).

optional.name: recipe_code
optional.description: Optional equality filter for recipes.recipe_name (leave blank for all).

datasets.description: Unpivot bin1..bin12 columns per batch to surface material, set, achieved, and error metrics.

columns.from: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY recipe_name, bin_no, batch_id)
CASE WHEN unpivot.bin_sp = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * (unpivot.bin_act - unpivot.bin_sp) / unpivot.bin_sp END

filters: Apply recipe_name = :recipe_code when recipe_code is provided

datasets.description: Aggregates the same filtered-unpivoted rows to total set/achieved/error columns.

columns.from: CASE WHEN SUM(unpivot.bin_sp) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * SUM(unpivot.bin_act - unpivot.bin_sp) / SUM(unpivot.bin_sp) END

filters: Reuse the same filtered population used for rows

reshape_rules.purpose: Unpivot bin1..bin12 into stacked material rows per batch.
